html:
Exclusive to:

The Sow's Ear Hat Shop is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Palace Pig City and sells a variety of Hats to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, The Sow's Ear Hat Shop also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, two Top Hats and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Lamps
    • 2.4 Window
    • 2.5 Doors
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering The Sow's Ear Hat Shop, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Hatmaker Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
Tam O' Shanter 50
Moggles 20
Captain Hat 20
Beefalo Hat 10
Cat Cap 10
Pith Hat 10
Top Hat 10
Winter Hat 10
Feather Hat 5
Rabbit Earmuffs 5
Straw Hat 3
Sewing Kit 50

Additionally, the following items can be bought from a shelf which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Cut Grass 1 4
Petals 1 4

Decor

  • Random Character Art
  • Random Character Art
  • Sewingmachine
  • Hatboxstack
  • Hatboxstack
  • Wall Mirror
  • Pipe Shelf

Shelfs

  • Floating Shelf

Pillar

  • Barret Wall Corner
  • Barret Wall Front
  • Hat Boxes Wall Corner
  • Hat Boxes Wall Front

Lamps

  • Hat Lantern Sidewall
  • Hat Lantern Backwall

Window

  • Round Burlap Window

Doors

  • Exit

Trivia

  • The shop's name alludes to the phrase "You can't make a silk hat out of a sow's ear", a rarer variant of the expression "You can't make a silk purse out of a sow's ear."

Gallery

  • The interior of The Sow's Ear Hat Shop.
StructuresCraftable Items

–Willow

–Webber

–Walani

“DOST GOT STUFFS FOR MINE HEAD”
–Wilba
“Has head things”
–Wormwood
“A good hat is always handy for bad hair days.”
–Wheeler

'''The Sow's Ear Hat Shop''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Pig City|Palace Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[:Category:Hats|Hats]] to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], The Sow's Ear Hat Shop also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Boards]], two [[Top Hat]]s and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering The Sow's Ear Hat Shop, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. A [[Hatmaker Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*The shop's name alludes to the phrase "You can't make a silk hat out of a sow's ear", a rarer variant of the expression "You can't make a silk '''purse''' out of a sow's ear."
